title: stenogrammitis pumila
intro: Stenogrammitis pumila, also known as the dwarf Stenogramma, is a small, epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm the digestive system. Its health benefits include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improving digestion, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties to combat infections. The herbal preparations of Stenogrammitis pumila typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in creams and ointments.
